allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); const content = fs.readFileSync\(''src/components/pages/LandingPage.tsx'', ''utf8''\); console.log\(''Lines:'', content.split\(''\\n''\).length\); console.log\(''Around line 118:''\); const lines = content.split\(''\\n''\); for\(let i = 115; i < 122; i++\) console.log\(i+1 + '':'', JSON.stringify\(lines[i]\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); const content = fs.readFileSync\(''src/components/pages/LandingPage.tsx'', ''utf8''\); const lines = content.split\(''\\n''\); let braceCount = 0, parenCount = 0; for\(let i = 0; i < 120; i++\) { for\(const c of lines[i]\) { if\(c === ''{''\) braceCount++; if\(c === ''}''\) braceCount--; if\(c === ''\(''\) parenCount++; if\(c === ''\)''\) parenCount--; } if\(braceCount < 0 || parenCount < 0\) console.log\(''Line'', i+1, ''brace:'', braceCount, ''paren:'', parenCount\); } console.log\(''At line 120 - brace:'', braceCount, ''paren:'', parenCount\);")
